dataList.name: Thermal Weapon
dataList.desc:
Begins Encounter with [HeatingWireOffSpider]

Turn Start: At 2+ [ReinforcedTattooSpiderDaughterTwo], gain [HeatingWireOnSpiderTwo] and also inflict [Combustion] with Skills that inflict [Laceration]

dataList.name: <s>The Middle</s>
dataList.desc: If this unit hit with more than 2 Skills, gain 1 [ReinforcedTattooSpiderDaughterTwo] for every excess Skill that hit

dataList.name: Resentment
dataList.desc:
When hit by a Skill, gain 2 [ResentmentSpiderDaughterTwo] (once per Skill)

When an ally is hit, gain 1 [ResentmentSpiderDaughterTwo] (once per Skill)

At max [ResentmentSpiderDaughterTwo] Stack, use a powerful attack

Turn End: At less than 80% / 60% / 40% HP, max out this unit's [ResentmentSpiderDaughterTwo] Stack
